description: Image file name
From segment_lips.py: 'ok', 'no_lip_found', or 'unreadable'
From segment_lips.py: percentage of frame occupied by the lip mask
From colour_correction_factors.py: 'calibrated', 'no_checker_found', 'fit_failed', or 'load_failed'
From colour_correction_factors.py: 'good', 'acceptable', or 'poor'. Rows marked 'poor' are excluded from corrected L, a, and b columns
Rotation at which the ColorChecker card was detected
Detected patch grid orientation and flip used for the correction fit
Number of ColorChecker patches used in the correction fit
Slope of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB L channel
Intercept of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB L channel
R2 of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB L channel
Slope of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB a channel
Intercept of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB a channel
R2 of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB a channel
Slope of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB b channel
Intercept of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB b channel
R2 of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB b channel
Mean ΔE between detected and reference patch Lab values, before correction
Mean ΔE between corrected and reference patch Lab values, after correction
Raw mean lightness value from extract_lip_colour.py, before correction is applied
Raw mean a* (green – red) value from extract_lip_colour.py, before correction is applied
Raw mean b* (blue – yellow) value from extract_lip_colour.py, before correction is applied
Lightness value after applying L_slope and L_intercept. Blank if correction factors, colour data, or quality rating are not all present
a* (green – red) value after applying a_slope and a_intercept. Blank if correction factors, colour data, or quality rating are not all present
b* (blue – yellow) value after applying b_slope and b_intercept. Blank if correction factors, colour data, or quality rating are not all present
Free-text note carried over from correction_factors.csv, e.g. 'use day-level fallback'
